pages.text: The $(item)Target Book$() tells your golems what to hunt. Hold it and right-click a mob to add that mob type to the target list, and your golems will then seek it out.
Sneak and right-click a mob to remove it from the list instead. There are two books (crafted with a $(item)Bone$() or $(item)Rotten Flesh$()) for separate target lists.
